personal.name: Jyoti Kumari Tiwari
personal.title: ML/MLOps Engineer
personal.tagline: Building AI Systems That Scale | Specialized in ML Deployment & Production Pipelines
personal.bio: ML/MLOps Engineer with expertise in deploying production-ready machine learning systems. Specialized in building end-to-end ML pipelines using Docker, FastAPI, and modern MLOps practices. Passionate about solving real-world problems with AI.

projects.name: Medical AI Assistant with RAG
projects.description: RAG-based Medical AI Assistant using LLMs, semantic search, and medical knowledge base for evidence-backed health information with source citations
highlights: Integrated medical knowledge base with semantic search
projects.impact: Provides accurate medical information with verifiable sources

projects.name: Fraud Detection MLOps System
projects.description: End-to-end MLOps fraud detection with monitoring, logging, inference tracking, and automated retraining pipeline
highlights: Complete MLOps pipeline from training to deployment
Model performance monitoring with Prometheus + Grafana
Inference logging and failure debugging system
projects.impact: Production-ready fraud detection with comprehensive monitoring

projects.name: Job Skill Analyzer
projects.description: AI-powered resume analyzer that matches skills with job descriptions using NLP and sentence embeddings to identify gaps and create learning roadmaps
highlights: Resume and job description parsing with NLP
Semantic similarity matching using sentence embeddings
projects.impact: Helps job seekers identify skill gaps and create targeted learning plans

projects.name: House Price Prediction API
projects.description: California housing price prediction using XGBoost with complete FastAPI deployment and Docker containerization
highlights: XGBoost regression model with feature engineering
RESTful API with FastAPI and automatic documentation
Input validation and comprehensive error handling
projects.impact: Real-time housing price predictions with high accuracy

projects.name: Wine Quality Prediction
projects.description: Multi-class wine quality classification using Random Forest with Flask API and model interpretation
highlights: Flask REST API with JSON responses
projects.impact: Automated wine quality assessment for vineyards

projects.name: Rock vs Mine Prediction
projects.description: Sonar signal classification for underwater object detection using machine learning with complete Docker setup
highlights: Binary classification on sonar signal data
Model evaluation with confusion matrix and metrics
projects.impact: Accurate underwater object detection for marine applications

projects.name: Fake News Detection
projects.description: TF-IDF and Logistic Regression based fake news classifier with Flask web interface and Docker deployment
highlights: Interactive web interface with real-time predictions
projects.impact: Helps identify misinformation with high accuracy

projects.name: Diabetes Prediction API
projects.description: SVM-based diabetes risk prediction with FastAPI deployment and comprehensive medical data preprocessing
highlights: Support Vector Machine classifier with RBF kernel
FastAPI REST endpoint with automatic docs

projects.name: Loan Status Prediction
projects.description: Loan approval prediction using SVM with FastAPI deployment and financial data analysis
